purpose: Machine-readable seed checklist for Gemia's five-day auto-improvement loop.

sources.notes: Authoritative project overview; last updated 2026-04-17 and currently stale versus agent_log.md.
Most complete shipped-wave history; latest logged completion is Wave 117.
Current cron loop still targets the obsolete 41-function list and is not the five-day controller.
Layer stack, plan materialization, keyframes, masks, transforms, and plan rendering.
Schema validation and preview smoke checks for layer plans.
Compositing DAG IR and neutral graph compiler.
Shadow preview rendering and preview manifest generation.
Proxy generation and same-basename-safe proxy naming.
Render backend contracts and preview/final render profiles.
Software backend for layer plans and compositing graphs.
AI catalog exclusions show that render/graph helpers are still infrastructure, not planner-exposed primitives.
Layer-plan render coverage.
Layer-plan validation coverage.
Compositing DAG coverage.
Shadow preview and inferred metadata coverage.
Proxy basename collision coverage.
Software render backend coverage.
Five-day loop contract, architecture lane note, and pending controller/media requirements.
Records compositing DAG IR, review findings, and real-video verification follow-up.
Records five-day controller, Gemini-native media path, two-hour heartbeat, five-hour rollover, and external-storage requirements.

minimum_primitives_from_logged_wave_math.notes: Wave 100 logged 500 functions shipped; Waves 101-117 add 17 more waves at 5 features each.

current_public_function_surface.notes: Counts public top-level functions in gemia/picture, gemia/audio, and gemia/video. Includes infrastructure/helpers in addition to user-facing primitives.

wave_status.notes: agent_log.md extends beyond GEMIA_PROJECT_RECORD.md and should seed the loop baseline.

completed_batches.evidence: agent_log.md marks all 41 original tasks complete and the project record treats the primitive expansion engine as established.
agent_log.md records the 500-function milestone at Wave 100.
agent_log.md records Wave 117 as the latest completion after Wave 100.

completed_review_fixes.evidence: ProxyManager now hashes the resolved source path and test_proxy covers same-basename sources.
test_preview and test_compositing_graph cover inferred canvas metrics plus start_frame+duration timing.

reproduction_twice_rule.rule: A feature or fix only counts as complete after two successful reproductions/passes.
evidence: The project record states 2x PASS verification as part of every Wave.
The legacy auto-loop prompt says 'Verify it passes twice.'
automation_expectations: Do not mark checklist items complete on a single green run.
Persist both pass attempts or equivalent evidence in the loop log.
Treat missing second-pass evidence as incomplete.

failure_breaker.rule: After three failures on the same item or failure class, stop autonomous advancement for that lane and write HUMAN_NEEDED.md.
automation_expectations: Increment a per-item or per-failure-class counter.
Reset the counter only after a verified fix reproduces twice.
Do not keep retrying indefinitely once the breaker trips.

notes: The five-day controller replaces the old 41-function cron loop.
The loop must wake itself every two hours and roll sessions every five hours.
Media generation must prefer Gemini-native paths for stock asset creation.

milestones.why: Existing Wave discipline is built around 5-feature batches.
required_actions: complete two-pass verification for the batch
append the batch result to agent_log-equivalent loop history
milestones.evidence: Current five-day loop batch completed five checklist items with two-pass verification: native stock fallback, heartbeat/rollover persistence, stock manifest/external-storage guard, legacy loop replacement, and graph metric-source metadata.

milestones.why: agent_log.md repeatedly schedules a full debug pass every 10 functions.
required_actions: review for stale failures or drift
do not advance the milestone without refreshed verification
milestones.evidence: The 10th completed feature triggered focused regression coverage and an Antigravity full-debug review gate at /Users/xiehaibo/.gemia/bridge/agents/antigravity/inbox/bridge_20260426_080809_f74ec6c1.json over the current five-day loop patch stack. Codex added a real Antigravity agent-queue consumer and processed the gate into /Users/xiehaibo/.gemia/bridge/agents/antigravity/outbox/bridge_20260426_080809_f74ec6c1.json. Native OpenClaw primary failed with context overflow / OpenRouter limits, then Claude Code fallback review succeeded with PASSED_WITH_CONDITIONS. The gate no longer depends on the bridge delegation acknowledgement in /Users/xiehaibo/.gemia/bridge/outbox/bridge_20260426_080809_f74ec6c1.json. Review conditions before feature 11: restart the Gemia LaunchAgent from a normal user shell, re-authenticate Codex CLI OAuth for rollover-codex, and set GEMIA_STOCK_ROOT to writable external storage.

milestones.why: Requested seed milestone for the five-day controller; the current logs already use larger integration checkpoints, so 30 features should force a heavier integration/review gate.
required_actions: run the review lane on current outputs
checkpoint the stock-media catalog state and open blockers if quality regresses

pending_loop_fixes.why: The current auto-loop still reads agent_log.md for the old 41-function flow and cannot coordinate a five-day controller.
done_when: the controller no longer asks for the next pending task in the 41-function list
the loop persists five-day state and lane status
the loop uses the new five-day contract rather than the cron-era prompt

verified_reproductions.evidence: Focused automation pytest confirms scripts/gemia_loop.sh delegates to _run_gemia_controller.sh tick-once and no longer references agent_log.md or the legacy 41-function flow.
Two isolated HOME CLI reproductions ran scripts/gemia_loop.sh successfully; each returned five-day controller tick-once output with stock_fill and rollover state instead of selecting legacy tasks.

pending_loop_fixes.why: The five-day loop explicitly requires Gemini-native media generation, but the recorded baseline still centers planning/images/videos around OpenRouter paths.
done_when: stock-media generation can use a native Gemini image/video path
fallback behavior is explicit
generated assets are cataloged for editing tests

verified_reproductions.evidence: Generated video-0001 via local_real_video while Gemini native media was paused by gemini_location_unsupported; focused automation tests passed.
Generated video-0002 and image-0002 via local real-media fallback after migrating away from an unwritable stock root; focused automation tests passed.

pending_loop_fixes.why: The new loop contract requires wake heartbeats every two hours and session rollover every five hours; the old cron script cannot do that.
done_when: heartbeat state is persisted
five-hour rollovers are explicit and observable
the controller survives unattended multi-day execution

verified_reproductions.evidence: GEMIA_ROLLOVER_OFFLINE_ONLY=1 scripts/_run_gemia_controller.sh rollover-once --force queued /Users/xiehaibo/.gemia/automation/rollovers/pending/rollover-20260426T000618-62763e01.json and mirrored it to the Claude Code bridge inbox.

Second offline rollover reproduction queued /Users/xiehaibo/.gemia/automation/rollovers/pending/rollover-20260426T000630-a3bd6449.json; heartbeat then reported pending rollovers in /Users/xiehaibo/.gemia/automation/heartbeat_state.json.

pending_loop_fixes.why: The five-day loop is expected to generate and catalog large stock media sets and move bulk output to external volumes when available.
done_when: generated stock assets have a manifest/catalog
preferred storage roots are explicit
large media output avoids filling the primary workspace disk

progress.note: Controller now writes a stock manifest, prefers external or explicit stock roots, and caps local workspace fallback at 3 videos plus 12 images so bulk fill cannot consume the primary workspace disk.

verified_reproductions.evidence: scripts/gemia_stock_fill.sh --image-limit 1 --video-limit 1 generated video-0003 and image-0003 from real local video sources; focused automation tests passed.
A second stock-fill run generated video-0004 and image-0004 from real local video sources; a follow-up run paused with external_storage_needed after the local fallback cap was reached.

pending_layer_dag_review_fixes.why: The architecture lane notes that graph metadata still cannot distinguish omitted default canvas metrics from explicitly provided ones.
done_when: compiled graph metadata records whether width/height/fps/total_frames were explicit or inferred
review lane no longer has to guess whether defaults were intentional

verified_reproductions.evidence: Compiled graph test with explicit width/height/fps/total_frames records all four metric_sources as explicit.
Compiled graph test using a real ffmpeg-generated H.264 sample video records width/height/fps/total_frames as inferred; shadow preview manifest preserves authored_metric_sources.

pending_layer_dag_review_fixes.why: The current backend seam is isolated and software-only; the next slice still has to decide between graph-native orchestrator execution and a non-software backend target.
done_when: a target backend strategy is chosen
the chosen backend is wired into real execution paths rather than existing as an isolated seam

verified_reproductions.evidence: CLI render-shadow-preview on real stock video-0003 selected backend auto -> software, wrote execution_graph.backend=software, and ffprobe verified preview-real-1.mp4 at 360x202 with 6 frames.
CLI render-shadow-preview on real stock video-0004 with --backend software wrote execution_graph.backend=software, and ffprobe verified preview-real-2.mp4 at 360x202 with 5 frames.

pending_layer_dag_review_fixes.why: Layer/DAG helpers exist, but render/graph helpers are still excluded from the AI catalog and mainly reachable through manual CLI commands.
done_when: the planner or controller can intentionally author and run layer-first workflows
the loop no longer treats layer/DAG work as manual-only infrastructure

verified_reproductions.evidence: PlanEngine executed gemia.video.layer_flow.render_layer_workflow on real stock video-0003; output real-1-layer-flow.mp4 is 360x202, 21 frames, manifest selected software via graph_native_software_orchestrator and layer_count=3.

PlanEngine executed the same planner-facing layer workflow on real stock video-0004 with backend=software; output real-2-layer-flow.mp4 is 360x202, 241 frames, manifest selected software and layer_count=3.

pending_layer_dag_review_fixes.why: Recent notes still say to verify against real video material instead of synthetic fixtures and to run the review lane on real outputs.
done_when: review artifacts are produced from real footage
the review lane records quality findings against real media, not only tests

verified_reproductions.evidence: CLI review-real-media passed on stock video-0003 -> real-1-layer-flow.mp4; report confirmed local_real_video source video-0003 through stock_catalog and recorded output_readable/output_visual_signal/render_backend_recorded/layer_flow_recorded findings.

CLI review-real-media passed on stock video-0004 -> real-2-layer-flow.mp4; report confirmed local_real_video source video-0004 through stock_catalog and recorded output_readable/output_visual_signal/render_backend_recorded/layer_flow_recorded findings.

pending_layer_dag_review_fixes.why: The layer renderer currently only validates or implements normal and multiply blend modes; screen and overlay remain reserved but not implemented.
done_when: screen and overlay are implemented and tested, or
the five-day controller explicitly treats richer blend modes as out of scope

verified_reproductions.evidence: Planner-facing layer workflow rendered stock video-0003 with a screen blend solid overlay; preview manifest recorded warm_screen_wash_composite blend_mode=screen, ffprobe verified 360x202 output with 21 frames, and review-real-media passed with real source confirmed through stock_catalog.

Planner-facing layer workflow rendered stock video-0004 with an overlay blend solid grade; preview manifest recorded teal_overlay_grade_composite blend_mode=overlay, ffprobe verified 360x202 output with 241 frames, and review-real-media passed with real source confirmed through stock_catalog.

attempts.next_action: Retry with a smaller edit prompt or switch to Codex implementation if the same Gemini fetch issue reaches three consecutive failures.

attempts.summary: Minimal Gemini CLI MCP health prompt timed out at the outer 120-second tool limit before returning a usable implementation lane response.
attempts.next_action: Run one direct shell-wrapper Gemini probe before marking the blended scene blocked.

attempts.summary: Direct shell-wrapper Gemini CLI health probe retried nine times and exited with TypeError: fetch failed sending request.
attempts.next_action: Human intervention required: restore Gemini CLI network/proxy path or explicitly approve an alternate review/implementation lane before implementing this scene.

attempts.summary: Implemented render_blended_portrait_slate_delivery_scene by composing existing primitives (Slate ID, UltraSharpen, face diagnostics, Blemish, and HTML graphics). Codex fixed metadata review wiring and verified two local_real_video reproductions.

architecture_integration.verification: py_compile passed; focused pytest passed (14 tests); two real local_real_video reproductions passed real-media review.

source.title: DaVinci Resolve What's New / Resolve 21 coverage

features.why: Resolve 21 adds AI Speech Generator for text-driven voiceover and narration generation.
done_when: Gemia can create a planner-visible speech-generation request artifact with repeatable voice/performance metadata
two real editing timelines can attach generated or dry-run voiceover assets with reviewable timing metadata
features.summary: planner-visible deterministic AI Speech Generator dry-run voiceover with request/timing metadata, dry_run=False rejection, start_seconds delayed audio attachment without truncation, focused tests, and two real-video reproductions.

features.why: Resolve 21 adds AI Dialogue Matcher for matching tone, level, and room environment between dialogue clips.
done_when: Gemia can analyze two dialogue clips and write match-level/reverb/tone adjustment metadata
two real audio/video examples produce matched dialogue previews or clear diagnostic sidecars
features.summary: planner-visible deterministic AI Dialogue Matcher analysis sidecar with level/tone/noise/room proxy actions, focused tests, and two real-video reproductions.

features.why: Resolve 21 adds AI Music Editor for fitting a music track to a target video duration.
done_when: Gemia can generate a music retiming/edit decision list with section markers
two real footage examples produce duration-matched music edit metadata and previews
features.summary: planner-visible AI Music Editor that fits a music bed to video duration, writes section markers/edit decisions, clamps target/fade safely, focused tests, and two real-video reproductions.

features.why: Resolve 21 adds AI Animated Subtitles that animate spoken words from transcription timing.
done_when: Gemia can turn word timing into animated subtitle layer plans
two real clips render subtitle animation previews and pass real-media review
features.summary: planner-visible AI Animated Subtitles that converts transcript or word timing into animated subtitle layer plans, renders preview MP4s, preserves audio when present, and writes animated_subtitles metadata.

features.why: Resolve 21 adds AI Multicam SmartSwitch for speaker-aware automatic camera angle selection.
done_when: Gemia can represent speaker/angle switch decisions as timeline metadata
two real or local multi-angle examples produce reviewable smart-switch timelines
features.summary: planner-visible AI Multicam SmartSwitch that maps speaker segments to camera angles, renders an ffmpeg segment-concat preview, preserves audio, and writes multicam_smartswitch metadata with switch decisions.

blended_scene.asset_requirement: real footage with dialogue or speech plus at least one music or subtitle track
workflow: match dialogue tone or record diagnostic metadata
fit a music bed to the edit duration
animate subtitle word timing
apply speaker-aware multicam/switch metadata where multiple angles exist
render two continuity-review clips
blended_scene.summary: fused Resolve-style scene chaining dialogue matching, speaker-aware multicam switching, animated subtitles, and music fitting with complete step sidecars.
verification: import smoke passed for gemia.video blended scene exports
ffprobe/real reproduction evidence with H.264 video and AAC audio

verified_reproductions.evidence: H.264/AAC output; dialogue, multicam, animated subtitle, and music sidecars all present.
H.264/AAC output; dialogue, multicam, animated subtitle, and music sidecars all present.

architecture_integration.why: Provide a real diarization boundary for speaker-aware subtitles, dialogue matching, and multicam SmartSwitch.
architecture_integration.integration_boundary: optional audio diarization adapter that emits speaker segments into Gemia timeline metadata; keep deterministic offline fallback tests.
architecture_integration.summary: planner-visible optional pyannote.audio speaker diarization backend with deterministic ffmpeg silence fallback metadata for speaker-aware subtitles, dialogue matching, and multicam switching.
verification: two local real-video fallback reproductions covered by tests

davinci_feature_batches.source: DaVinci Resolve 21 current feature scan, seeded after batch_003 five-feature completion

features.why: Resolve 21 adds a Photo page for batch editing and grading still images.

two real image/video-derived frame sets produce reviewable grade manifests

features.why: Resolve 21 introduces AI IntelliSearch style semantic media search.
done_when: Gemia can build local semantic metadata for media bins

features.why: Resolve 21 adds AI slate and clip metadata extraction for faster ingest.
done_when: Gemia can extract slate-like metadata into timeline/bin records
two real clips produce reviewable slate metadata sidecars

features.why: Resolve 21 improves Fairlight organization with folder-track style workflows.

features.summary: Fairlight-style folder track manifests now group real audio/video assets into dialogue/music/sfx/ambience folders with ffprobe-backed audio stream, duration, and diagnostics metadata.
verification: two real edit timeline grouped-audio reproductions under /private/tmp/gemia-fairlight-batch004-repro

features.why: Resolve 21 includes Krokodove/Fusion style motion-graphics expansion.
done_when: Gemia can represent reusable motion-graphics node presets
two real clips render reviewable graphics overlays
features.summary: Krokodove/Fusion-style motion pack now represents reusable node presets, renders overlay graphics on real clips, copies source audio when present, and writes reviewable sidecar metadata.
verification: two real clip Krokodove overlay reproductions under /private/tmp/gemia-krokodove-batch004-repro

workflow: ingest real footage and still frames
extract slate/media metadata
query with AI IntelliSearch style ranking
group audio assets as folder tracks
render a Fusion-style graphics review clip

architecture_integration.summary: Added an optional OpenImageIO/Pillow/OpenCV still metadata ingest substrate, deterministic image-sequence manifests, media-library image_ingest metadata merge, strict asset-id validation, and cache filename traversal protection.

two real-video frame import reproductions from inputs/demo.mp4 and inputs/gemia_timeline_demo.mp4

two real clips produce reviewable macro-template manifests

seed_ready_checks.notes: Checklist baseline uses agent_log.md Wave 117 instead of the stale Wave 105 project-record headline.
The checklist explicitly marks scripts/gemia_loop.sh as obsolete for the five-day controller.
Pending architecture, feature, and review items are encoded as machine-readable checklist entries.
The checklist includes the known places where real media assets are still required.
